questions.explanation: Total number of non-trained male teachers in college A = 225 ![](https://appx-db.akamai.net.in/bulk_uploader_images/1723278079844_image022.png) = 126 Total number of non-trained female teachers in college B = 128 ![](https://appx-db.akamai.net.in/bulk_uploader_images/1723278079844_image023.png) = 96 Total number of non-trained male teachers in college A and non-trained female teachers in college B = 126 + 96 = 222

questions.explanation: Total number of students playing cricket from all the schools = 100 + 150 + 200 + 300 + 200 = 950 Total number of students playing Tennis from all the schools = 200 + 220 + 210 + 210 + 230 = 1070 Difference between the total number of students playing cricket from all the schools and the total number of students playing Tennis from all the schools = 1070 - 950 = 120
